# Spendly AI

> AI-powered personal finance and expense tracking mobile app for iOS and Android.

Spendly AI is a personal finance application currently in active development, launching soon on the App Store and Google Play. It uses artificial intelligence to make expense tracking effortless — you can add transactions by typing or speaking in natural language, and the AI handles categorization, organization, and analytics automatically.

## Core Features

- **Text AI**: Type expenses naturally — "coffee 4.50" or "paid rent 500 eur" — and the AI parses amount, merchant, and category instantly
- **Voice AI**: Speak transactions aloud; the app processes speech and creates the entry without manual input
- **Manual Entry**: Traditional form-based input also available
- **Auto-Categorization**: AI assigns categories (Food, Transport, Utilities, etc.) with 97%+ accuracy
- **Multiple Wallets**: Create cash, savings, or custom wallets; set a default wallet for quick entry
- **Multi-Currency Support**: 100+ currencies supported; set a main currency and all balances are converted using live exchange rates
- **Spending Analytics**: Cash flow trend charts, income vs expense ratio, spending breakdown by category
- **Budget Tracking**: Set monthly budgets per category with real-time progress bars
- **Transaction Search**: Instantly search across all transactions
- **Categories**: Customizable expense and income categories; pin up to 10 favorites for quick access

## Status

Spendly AI is currently in active development. It is not yet available for download. Users can join the waitlist at https://spendly-ai.com to receive an email notification when the app launches.

## Technical Details

- Platform: iOS and Android (React Native / Expo)
- AI: On-device and cloud AI for transaction parsing
- Data: User financial data is encrypted at rest (AES-256) and in transit (TLS 1.3)
- Storage: Data stored on servers in the European Union
- Pricing: Free to download and use

## Contact

- Website: https://spendly-ai.com
- Support email: support@spendly-ai.com
- Privacy Policy: https://spendly-ai.com/privacy
- Terms of Use: https://spendly-ai.com/terms
